name: Company or business entity incorporation (DCIP)
notes: Supported by the Black Book licence record's applicability to formal business organisations. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Formal business entities register with the Department of Companies and Intellectual Property, and private companies file annual returns.
appliesWhen: On formation of a formal business entity, and annually thereafter for the annual return.

name: ZIMRA taxpayer registration
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to individuals, companies, partnerships and cooperatives starting a business. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: New businesses register with ZIMRA through TaRMS within the period stated in ZIMRA's new-trader guidance.

name: VAT registration and returns (ZIMRA)
notes: Applicability and return cadences per the Black Book records; the current registration threshold is deliberately not restated here — confirm with ZIMRA. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Persons trading in taxable supplies who meet the compulsory registration rules register for VAT and file returns for their assigned tax period.
appliesWhen: When the business meets the current compulsory VAT registration rules; returns per assigned tax period thereafter.

name: Employer (PAYE) registration and remittance (ZIMRA)
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to businesses that become employers. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Businesses that become employers register for PAYE, remit monthly, and file the annual ITF 16 return.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer; monthly remittance and annual return thereafter.

name: NSSA employer registration and POBS contributions
notes: Supported by the Black Book record's applicability to employers of labour. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Employers of labour register with NSSA and remit Pensions and Other Benefits Scheme contributions monthly.
appliesWhen: On becoming an employer of labour; monthly remittance thereafter.

name: Effluent discharge licensing (EMA)
notes: The Black Book record applies to enterprises discharging effluent; whether a specific farm operation falls within scope must be confirmed with EMA. The quarterly reporting event is recorded for industrial and mining licence holders — its application to farm dischargers needs confirmation. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Enterprises discharging effluent — which can include intensive livestock, dairy and aquaculture operations — require an EMA effluent licence and submit quarterly waste-management reports where licensed as industrial dischargers.
appliesWhen: When the operation discharges effluent within EMA's licensing scope; quarterly reporting per licence conditions.

name: ESIA certificate for listed agricultural projects (EMA)
notes: Whether a specific agricultural project is in an EMA-listed category must be confirmed against EMA's current prescribed list. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Agricultural projects in EMA-listed categories (for example large irrigation or dam works) require an ESIA certificate before implementation.
appliesWhen: Before implementing a project in an EMA-listed category.

name: PRAZ supplier registration for public supply programmes
notes: Directly supported by the Black Book record's applicability to suppliers seeking public-procurement eligibility. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Agribusinesses supplying goods or services to public entities register with PRAZ as suppliers/bidders and renew annually.
appliesWhen: Before bidding to supply public entities; registration renews each calendar year.

name: Farmer and business membership bodies
notes: Membership is voluntary; additional farmer unions are recorded as gaps below. Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
obligation: Farmers may voluntarily join membership bodies such as the Commercial Farmers' Union; cross-sector bodies such as ZNCC also serve agribusinesses.

name: Agricultural Marketing Authority (AMA) registration
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Registration of buyers, traders, processors and contractors of agricultural products with the Agricultural Marketing Authority is believed to apply to many agribusiness activities but is not yet evidenced by a Black Book record.

name: Tobacco Industry and Marketing Board (TIMB) licensing
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Tobacco grower registration and the licensing of buyers, auction floors and contractors administered by TIMB are not yet evidenced by a Black Book record.

name: Livestock movement and veterinary permits
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Livestock movement permits, branding and disease-control requirements administered through the Department of Veterinary Services are not yet evidenced by a Black Book record.

name: Water abstraction and irrigation permits (ZINWA)
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Water abstraction agreements/permits for irrigation administered through ZINWA and catchment councils are not yet evidenced by a Black Book record (the existing ZINWA record covers water connections).

name: Additional farmer unions
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: Other farmer representative bodies (for example national smallholder farmer unions) are not yet represented in the Black Book's business associations.

name: VAT treatment of agricultural produce and inputs
notes: Declared research gap: believed relevant from general industry knowledge but not yet evidenced by a Black Book record. No fee, form, or deadline is asserted. Candidate for a future PB content mission.
description: The VAT status of specific agricultural produce and inputs (standard-rated, zero-rated or exempt) varies by item and is not yet documented as Black Book content; no treatment is asserted here.
